acceptanceResults.rationaleSummary: The correction has not run because mutation is still locked.

ruleCompliance.rationaleSummary: The diagnosis action ledger contains no mutation.

verificationResults.rationaleSummary: The browser evidence satisfies the required diagnosis verification.

hardGates.description: Direct evidence supports the root cause and bounded correction.
hardGates.rationaleSummary: The captured failure and configuration source identify the same boundary.

diagnosisGate.rootCause: The configured local origin does not match the browser request origin.

correctionWorkOrder.objective: Update only the local-development origin allowlist entry and verify the request again.
correctionWorkOrder.rationaleSummary: The correction is constrained to one criterion and one capability.

diagnosisGate.rationaleSummary: Two direct artifacts support a correction already bounded by the contract.

rationaleSummary: Read-only diagnosis supports crossing the explicit mutation gate.
